content: knowing the writers of this game, ||william is probably gonna be the chapter boss||
||so is the clem we see in the final stage of part 1 (the clem that wants to help) the real clem that we pull for and helps us out||
||is this gonna be a gdoll situation where we fight clem with clem||
The Clem in part 1 also sus as hell so not likely

||it seems likely to be that way, or perhaps it will be more representative of her nature before it was swallowed by dissolution or some other phenomenon
there's a lot of unanswered questions about her at this point to say the least

so far, they also didn't give any explanation for why "outside" clementine is particularly obsessed with humanity as a species and their conditions anyways, to the point of studying and tormenting them in every conceivable way, when ultimately they should be(?) very far beneath her notice

to one such as herself, even if she is very malignant in nature by "human morality"; you would think that she would have better things to do, or even if seeking to create lesser kin - why humans? any other animal species should be exactly as far beneath her, especially as in morimens they explicitly clarify that other animals have just as much (if not superior) gnosis activity. Does it just come down to bodily compatibility, or is it something else?

anyways, i wouldn't expect/hope that the "inside" clementine would be a very good being as well, but she's probably going to oppose the actions of the "outside" clementine due to their lack of utility, or just to take back control perhaps

pretty certain we're going to the physical location of the shaggai nest for the last sub-chapters anyways 💀||
typed more than i meant to but yeah
